offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We reconcile daily sales data with payment gateway reports instead of manual reconciliation of sales and payment reports.
problem: Discrepancies between sales data and payment gateway reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows

Share in community forums for Etsy sellers

pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Make a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
